page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: The Read Origin Protocol (ROP) is a computational protocol that aims to discover the source of all reads, including those originating from repeat sequences, recombinant B and T cell receptors, and microbial communities.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Discovering the source of all reads originating from complex RNA molecules.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Discovering the source of all reads originating from complex RNA molecules.
